channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Middle East Conflicts Threaten SADC Region’s Economy and Food Security
item.description: Rising tensions and ongoing conflicts in the Middle East are giving serious economic wahala for countries inside the Southern African Development Community (SADC). South Africa’s Minister of Internati...

item.title: President Tinubu Condoles With Family of Late OMPADEC Administrator Sir Albert Nnamani
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu don express im sorrow as dem lost Sir Albert Ikechukwu Nnamani, former Administrative Secretary of OMPADEC, wey die at 82 years old. According to statement wey Tinubu Speci...

item.title: Conflict in Iran disrupts South Asian energy supply, impacting daily life
item.description: The conflict in Iran has triggered a significant energy crisis across South Asia, affecting millions of people as fuel prices soar and supply chains are disrupted. Liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) shorta...

item.title: Deputy President Kindiki launches 2026 Safari Rally in Naivasha
item.description: On Thursday, 12th March 2026, Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua flagged off the highly anticipated 2026 Safari Rally in Naivasha, Nakuru County. This annual motorsport event is one of the most promine...

item.title: Canadian Soccer Star Jordyn Huitema Joins Chicago Stars on Three-Year Deal
item.description: The Chicago Stars have officially signed Canadian international Jordyn Huitema from Seattle Reign FC. The transfer involved US$200,000 in allocation money and a US$300,000 transfer fee, with Huitema a...

item.title: US Involvement in Khamenei’s Assassination Highlights Historical Reliance on Proxies
item.description: In late February 2026, Iran’s Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, was assassinated in a joint operation by the United States and Israel. While the US played a significant role in planning the oper...

item.title: Ronnie Alonte and Loisa Andalio Share Moments with Newborn Baby Nili
item.description: Actors Ronnie Alonte and Loisa Andalio are celebrating a new chapter in their lives as they embrace parenthood. The couple shared heartwarming photos featuring their newborn, Baby Nili, giving fans a ...

item.title: Thrissur district completes housing support for all eligible beneficiaries under LIFE Mission
item.description: Thrissur district in Kerala has successfully achieved full housing coverage under the LIFE Mission, marking a significant milestone in the state’s social welfare initiatives. Revenue and Housing Minis...

item.title: Indian airlines restart Riyadh flights amid Iran-US tensions, authorities monitoring situation closely
item.description: Due to the escalating tensions between Iran and the United States, Indian airlines have resumed flights to Riyadh while keeping a careful watch on the situation. The government is closely monitoring d...

item.title: Ezemvelo KZN Wildlife Reports Sharp Drop in Rhino Poaching in Key Park, Advocates for Regulated Horn Trade Discussion
item.description: South Africa experienced a 16% reduction in rhino poaching in 2025, with 352 rhinos killed nationwide compared to 420 in 2024. This decline includes a notable improvement in KwaZulu-Natal's Hluhluwe-i...

item.title: Australia escalates involvement in Iran conflict, testing Labor government domestically
item.description: As the conflict with Iran enters its second week, Australia's role has shifted from symbolic support to active involvement. Reports indicate that three Australians were present on a US submarine invol...

item.title: Australia introduces temporary visa restrictions amid Middle East conflict concerns
item.description: The Australian government has introduced legislation giving the Home Affairs Minister the power to temporarily block certain visa classes, a move critics say could prevent vulnerable people fleeing co...

item.title: Red fox travels from Southampton to New York aboard cargo ship and arrives safely at Bronx Zoo
item.description: A red fox has undertaken an extraordinary journey across the Atlantic, travelling from Southampton, England to New York, USA aboard a cargo ship carrying automobiles. The male fox, estimated to weigh ...

item.title: Archaeologists Discover Oldest Mithras Temple in Bavaria
item.description: Archaeologists in Regensburg, Germany, have uncovered a rare Roman temple linked to the secretive Mithras cult, marking the oldest known sanctuary of its kind in Bavaria. The temple, built during the ...

item.title: GPS Jamming and Spoofing Disrupt Navigation in UAE Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: Due to the ongoing Middle East war that started late last month with US and Israeli actions against Iran, people in the UAE are facing serious GPS problems on their phones and navigation systems. The ...

item.title: Tinubu Recalls Struggles For Democracy, Advocates Direct Primaries At Interfaith Iftar
item.description: President Bola Tinubu, during an interfaith iftar held at the Presidential Villa in Abuja, where he hosted members of the All Progressives Congress (APC) National Working Committee and leaders of the ...

item.title: US-Israel conflict drives global economic uncertainty, prompting calls for Australia to reduce dependence
item.description: The ongoing US-Israeli military action against Iran is escalating global economic risks, with oil prices climbing after a brief pause. Donald Trump’s optimistic statements suggesting the conflict woul...

item.title: Autumn Snyder's Life and Legacy: A Story of Family, Struggles, and Impact
item.description: Autumn Snyder, adopted daughter of filmmaker Zack Snyder, was born on 27 November 1996 in China and grew up in Pasadena, California. She was one of eight children in the Snyder family. Autumn struggle...

item.title: Strategies and Challenges of Women Entrepreneurs in Ghana’s Informal Economy
item.description: For many women in Ghana, the informal economy na the main way dem dey make ends meet. Dis economy dey outside formal rules, meaning say plenty people dey trade without official registration, social pr...

item.title: Two Injured in Shooting at Old Dominion University; Gunman Dead
item.description: A shooting occurred Thursday morning at Old Dominion University in Norfolk, Virginia, resulting in two individuals being critically injured and the gunman dead. The incident took place in the universi...
